targets.query:
from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages" and r.direction == "sent")
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.transport == "online" then "Online" else "Offline" }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

import "date"
import "array"

base = array.from(rows: [
    {day_of_week: "Monday",    _field: "Online",  _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Tuesday",   _field: "Online",  _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Wednesday", _field: "Online",  _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Thursday",  _field: "Online",  _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Friday",    _field: "Online",  _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Saturday",  _field: "Online",  _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Sunday",    _field: "Online",  _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Monday",    _field: "Offline", _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Tuesday",   _field: "Offline", _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Wednesday", _field: "Offline", _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Thursday",  _field: "Offline", _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Friday",    _field: "Offline", _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Saturday",  _field: "Offline", _value: 0},
    {day_of_week: "Sunday",    _field: "Offline", _value: 0},
])

actual = from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _value: 1,
      _field: if r.transport == "online" then "Online" else "Offline",
      day_of_week:
        if date.weekDay(t: r._time) == 0 then "Sunday"
        else if date.weekDay(t: r._time) == 1 then "Monday"
        else if date.weekDay(t: r._time) == 2 then "Tuesday"
        else if date.weekDay(t: r._time) == 3 then "Wednesday"
        else if date.weekDay(t: r._time) == 4 then "Thursday"
        else if date.weekDay(t: r._time) == 5 then "Friday"
        else "Saturday"
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_field", "day_of_week"])

union(tables: [base, actual])
  |> group(columns: ["day_of_week", "_field"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["day_of_week"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages"
      and r.direction == "sent"
      and r.transport == "online")
  |> count()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Online"})

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages"
      and r.direction == "sent"
      and r.transport == "ble")
  |> count()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Offline"})

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages" and r.direction == "received")
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.transport == "online" then "Online" else "Offline" }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> group(columns: ["city"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1w, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.transport == "online" then "Online" else "Offline" }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
